sessions.lever: control-flow restructure reproduces the missing beq $s1,$0 branch (96->97 insns); register-rotation $s4/$s5 + $v0/$v1 did NOT yield to decl-order

reviewer.evidence: The structural base in rejected/ (branch-correct, 97 insns) is clean pure C — no do-while, no pins, no injected asm. It is NOT saved as candidate.c only because it scores 14 > HEAD 13 (the RA swap, now exposed without the merged branch, costs 1). No cheat present; it just isn't a floor improvement yet. The remaining gap is pure register-rotation.

remaining_gap.summary: Two independent issues. (1) SOLVED in pure C: target has a 2nd `beqz $s1,$0` (reload check) that GCC folds on first entry; moving `i=0; tbl=base;` ahead of the `outer:` check makes GCC emit it (96->97). (2) WALL: coupled register rotation — target one=1->$s4, mask_const=0xFFFFFF->$s3, base->$s5 (mine swaps $s4/$s5); plus a $v0<->$v1 swap in the done-block mask compare (lw/and/addu operand order). Declaration-order swap did NOT move the RA.
remaining_gap.rules_required_for_full_match: 1 lost-codegen `insert beq $17,$0` (the missing branch — now shown pure-C-solvable via the control-flow restructure) + 11 `subst` register-swap/operand-order rules ($20<->$21 = $s4/$s5, $2<->$3 = $v0/$v1, and/addu operand reorders). The 11 RA rules are the wall.

next_hypotheses: START from rejected/goto_outer_recheck_97insn.c (branch already correct) and attack ONLY the RA swap. The lost-codegen insert can then be retired too.

Lever A: shrink/relocate the live range of `one` vs `mask_const` so the allocator flips $s4/$s5 (decl-order did nothing; try using mask_const before one in the loop expression, or a block-local for one of them).
Instrumented cc1 ALLOCDBG (register-alloc-deep-dive recipe) to read why one->$s5 not $s4.
The done-block $v0/$v1 swap: try reading *ctrl into a fresh local vs reusing `val` to flip which value lands in $v0.

rejected_forms.form: swap declaration + init order of one / mask_const
rejected_forms.reason: No change — $s4/$s5 allocation is not declaration-order driven here.
Reproduces the missing branch (97 insns) but the RA swap costs +1; clean C, just not a floor improvement. Best base preserved in rejected/goto_outer_recheck_97insn.c.
